'''Patel Odfath''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] operative. Odfath was holding some key [[Datafile/Legends|datafiles]] when he was captured by [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Lu'daal-ud]] around [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] or [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]]. Those datafiles were coded, but they included information that could be a life-or-death question for almost one thousand of Rebel operatives in different regions of the galaxy. Rebel [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Zgorth'sth]] wanted to organize a mission to recover the datafiles before Lu'daal-ud discovered the information and tried to sell it to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="AIR" />
